summary: Tested P0 (accent removal, U6-U12 age groups) and P1 (inline attendance for fixtures) features. Backend tests 100% pass. Frontend P1 inline attendance working correctly. P0 accent removal has issues in admin sidebar.

ui_bugs.issue: P0 FAIL: Sidebar group labels (ΣΥΛΛΌΓΟΣ, ΑΚΑΔΗΜΊΑ, ΔΙΑΧΕΊΡΙΣΗ, ΚΑΤΆΣΤΗΜΑ, ΡΥΘΜΊΣΕΙΣ) contain Greek accents when rendered in uppercase. The labels use CSS 'uppercase' class but don't use stripGreekAccents() utility.
ui_bugs.fix_location: /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.jsx lines 3447-3482 (sidebarConfig) and line 3610 where label is rendered

ui_bugs.issue: P0 FAIL: Stats bar shows 'ΘΈΣΗ ΠΡΩΤΑΘΛΉΜΑΤΟΣ' with accents - should be 'ΘΕΣΗ ΠΡΩΤΑΘΛΗΜΑΤΟΣ'

action_items: P0 HIGH: Fix sidebar group labels to use stripGreekAccents() utility. In AdminPanel.jsx line 3610, change {item.label} to {stripGreekAccents(item.label)}. Import stripGreekAccents from '../utils/greekText'
P0 MEDIUM: Fix homepage hero stats text to strip accents from 'ΘΈΣΗ ΠΡΩΤΑΘΛΉΜΑΤΟΣ'
critical_code_review_comments: The stripGreekAccents utility exists at /app/frontend/src/utils/greekText.js but is not being used in the admin sidebar labels
Sidebar labels at lines 3447-3482 have accented Greek text that gets rendered in uppercase via CSS but accents are preserved
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 accent removal issue is in AdminPanel.jsx sidebar. The stripGreekAccents utility exists but is not being applied to sidebar group labels. P1 inline attendance for fixtures is working correctly - expandable cards show player list with check/X buttons.

P0 PASS: btn-primary and btn-secondary buttons show text without accents
P0 PASS: Academy section shows U6-U12 age range (not U8-U18)
P0 PASS: Academy group creation placeholder shows U12 (not U18)
P1 PASS: Team detail Schedule tab fixtures render as expandable cards with chevron
P1 PASS: Clicking fixture card expands to show InlineAttendance component with player list and check/X buttons
P1 PASS: Backend /api/admin/events/{event_id}/attendance endpoint works for fixture event IDs
failed_tests: P0 FAIL: Admin sidebar labels ΣΥΛΛΌΓΟΣ, ΑΚΑΔΗΜΊΑ, ΔΙΑΧΕΊΡΙΣΗ, ΚΑΤΆΣΤΗΜΑ, ΡΥΘΜΊΣΕΙΣ contain accents
